description: Enables extended thinking (chain-of-thought reasoning) on every turn. Claude spends more time reasoning through problems before responding, with interleaved thinking between tool calls.

baseline_observations.without_feature: Claude uses adaptive thinking which dynamically adjusts reasoning effort. Extended thinking is available but not forced on every turn.
baseline_observations.expected_with_feature: Every response includes explicit extended thinking. May improve accuracy on complex tasks but increases latency and token consumption.
baseline_observations.notes: Significant cost and latency implications. Adaptive thinking (default) may already provide equivalent quality. Needs controlled A/B comparison before promotion.
